calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Qing Fei Xiao, present in pro per for self and as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Xiao Xiao and Rui Xiao.
Co-Petitioner/Mother of the Minors: Elaine Xu, also present.
Petitioners were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of an Adult to: David Xiao.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Annie Xiao and Michael Xiao.
Decree signed in open court.
